title: chrysothamnus parryi subsp. howardii
intro: Chrysothamnus parryi subsp. howardii, also known as Howards Chrysothamnus or Howards Bush Sunflower, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Chrysothamnus parryi subsp. howardii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiseptic properties. Chrysothamnus parryi subsp. howardii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
